text: 欲买桂花同载酒，终不似，少年游。
A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies. The man who never reads lives only one.
人生有两出悲剧：一是万念俱灰，另一是踌躇满志。
Get busy living, or get busy dying.
今宵酒醒何处，杨柳岸晓风残月。
You have to be odd to be number one.
种一棵树最好的时间是十年前，其次是现在。
When one door of happiness closes, another opens.
野火烧不尽，春风吹又生。
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
无论多么艰难的日子，都要阳光地去面对。
Every moment is a fresh beginning.
人生自古谁无死，留取丹心照汗青。
Spread love everywhere you go.
我们都是赶路的人，但别忘了欣赏沿途的风景。
I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
莫道桑榆晚，为霞尚满天。
You can't go back and change the beginning, but you can start where you are and change the ending.
一切过去了的，都会变成亲切的怀念。
The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
兴尽晚回舟，误入藕花深处。
The unexamined life is not worth living.
这个世界上没有不带伤的人，重要的是带伤奔跑。
Even the darkest night will end and the sun will rise.
梧桐更兼细雨，到黄昏点点滴滴。
That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
走得最急的，都是最美的风景。
Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
生当作人杰，死亦为鬼雄。
We read to know we are not alone.
时间是最好的答案，也是最好的解药。
We accept the love we think we deserve.
我寄愁心与明月，随风直到夜郎西。
In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
你的善良，必须带一点锋芒。
The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
纸上得来终觉浅，绝知此事要躬行。
Imagination is more important than knowledge.
不要因为走得太远，忘了我们为什么出发。
It is not length of life, but depth of life.
大漠孤烟直，长河落日圆。
Courage is not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
把每一次日落，都当作礼物。
I can't change the direction of the wind, but I can adjust my sails to always reach my destination.
功名只向马上取，真是英雄一丈夫。
We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
每个你所不喜欢的现在，都是未来你会喜欢的曾经。
Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that.
疏影横斜水清浅，暗香浮动月黄昏。
Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
再长的路，一步步也能走完；再短的路，不迈开双脚也无法到达。
The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
明月几时有，把酒问青天。
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
在人生的旅途中，能找到一条适合自己的路，并坚持走下去，这就是成功。
Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
何当共剪西窗烛，却话巴山夜雨时。
Only in the darkness can you see the stars.
用最少的悔恨面对过去，用最少的浪费面对现在，用最多的梦面对未来。
I like the dreams of the future better than the history of the past.
沉舟侧畔千帆过，病树前头万木春。
The secret of success is to do the common things uncommonly well.
一个人的成熟，不是越来越封闭，而是越来越包容。
Try not to become a man of success. Rather become a man of value.
射人先射马，擒贼先擒王。
If you tell the truth, you don't have to remember anything.
人生没有白走的路，每一步都算数。
Whoever is happy will make others happy too.
无边落木萧萧下，不尽长江滚滚来。
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
不要等待机会，而要创造机会。
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
林花谢了春红，太匆匆。
No great mind has ever existed without a touch of madness.
最美的风景，往往在最难走的路上。
What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
曾经沧海难为水，除却巫山不是云。
Tell me and I forget. Teach me and I remember. Involve me and I learn.
愿你出走半生，归来仍是少年。
Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
剪不断，理还乱，是离愁，别是一般滋味在心头。
In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
一个人能走多远，要看他与谁同行。
Float like a butterfly, sting like a bee.
问渠那得清如许，为有源头活水来。
No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
不是每一次努力都会有收获，但是，每一次收获都必须努力。
We know what we are, but know not what we may be.
男儿何不带吴钩，收取关山五十州。
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
有梦想，有机会，有奋斗，一切美好的东西都能创造出来。
We make a living by what we get, but we make a life by what we give.
落红不是无情物，化作春泥更护花。
The flowers of tomorrow are in the seeds of today.
你若盛开，清风自来。
You can't use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
春潮带雨晚来急，野渡无人舟自横。
Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.
做自己，因为别人都有人做了。
You've gotta dance like there's nobody watching, love like you'll never be hurt.
黑发不知勤学早，白首方悔读书迟。
If life were predictable it would cease to be life, and be without flavor.
生活不是等待暴风雨过去，而是学会在雨中跳舞。
Either write something worth reading or do something worth writing.
月落乌啼霜满天，江枫渔火对愁眠。
All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us.
趁我们还年轻，趁我们还可以做梦。
It does not matter how slowly you go so long as you do not stop.
读书破万卷，下笔如有神。
If you set your goals ridiculously high and it's a failure, you will fail above everyone else's success.
生活中最难忘的往往不是大喜大悲，而是平淡中的感动。
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
千里江山寒色远，芦花深处泊孤舟。
We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
哪有什么岁月静好，不过是有人替你负重前行。
A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
枯藤老树昏鸦，小桥流水人家，古道西风瘦马。
I am the master of my fate, I am the captain of my soul.
人间烟火气，最抚凡人心。
Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
海内存知己，天涯若比邻。
If you're not stubborn, you'll give up on experiments too soon.
生活虐我千百遍，我待生活如初恋。
Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
露从今夜白，月是故乡明。
Don't wish it were easier; wish you were better.
人生最美好的，就是在你失去的时候，还有东西可以失去。
The mind is everything. What you think you become.
桃花潭水深千尺，不及汪伦送我情。
We are made of star-stuff.
每个人都有一段艰难的岁月，生活得不到别人的帮助，只能自己撑下去。
Be the change you wish to see in the world.
问君能有几多愁，恰似一江春水向东流。
You will face many defeats in life, but never let yourself be defeated.
风雨之后才能见彩虹，没有人能随随便便成功。
Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.
烽火连三月，家书抵万金。
I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
当你感到疲惫的时候，那是因为你走了一段上坡路。
If you look at what you have in life, you'll always have more.
不经一番寒彻骨，怎得梅花扑鼻香。
Where there is love there is life.
世界上最宽阔的是海洋，比海洋更宽阔的是天空，比天空更宽阔的是人的胸怀。
The question isn't who is going to let me; it's who is going to stop me.
少壮不努力，老大徒伤悲。
Stars can't shine without darkness.
山河远阔，人间烟火，无一是你，无一不是你。
An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
身无彩凤双飞翼，心有灵犀一点通。
I cannot live without books.
有些事情不是看到了希望才去坚持，而是坚持了才会看到希望。
Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
天若有情天亦老，人间正道是沧桑。
We must accept finite disappointment, but never lose infinite hope.
不是所有坚持都有结果，但总有一些坚持，能带来意想不到的质变。
Without continual growth and progress, such words as improvement, achievement, and success have no meaning.
宝剑锋从磨砺出，梅花香自苦寒来。
If opportunity doesn't knock, build a door.
生命是一袭华美的袍，爬满了蚤子。
There is no passion to be found playing small — in settling for a life that is less than the one you are capable of living.
欲穷千里目，更上一层楼。
Not all those who wander are lost.
人的一生只有一次青春，现在，青春是用来奋斗的。
Well done is better than well said.
出师未捷身先死，长使英雄泪满襟。
Not until we are lost do we begin to understand ourselves.
一切都是最好的安排。
Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and no good thing ever dies.
东风不与周郎便，铜雀春深锁二乔。
When life gives you lemons, make lemonade.
人生有太多的不确定，但努力永远是最好的选择。
The soul that sees beauty may sometimes walk alone.
但愿人长久，千里共婵娟。
You can never cross the ocean until you have the courage to lose sight of the shore.
我不知道未来会怎样，但我知道，只要努力，一切皆有可能。
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
此情可待成追忆，只是当时已惘然。
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
哪怕是最漫长的夜，也会天亮。
Too many of us are not living our dreams because we are living our fears.
长风破浪会有时，直挂云帆济沧海。
When the going gets tough, the tough get going.
即使翅膀断了，心也要飞翔。
After all this time? Always.
无可奈何花落去，似曾相识燕归来。
A room without books is like a body without a soul.
如果你长时间盯着深渊，深渊也会回望你。
You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
海上生明月，天涯共此时。
Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
人生最重要的不是你站在哪里，而是你朝着哪个方向走。
All you need is love.
落花人独立，微雨燕双飞。
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
把每一个平凡的日子，过成不平凡的日子。
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
千磨万击还坚劲，任尔东西南北风。
To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
真正的平静，不是避开车马喧嚣，而是在心中修篱种菊。
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
山重水复疑无路，柳暗花明又一村。
It always seems impossible until it's done.
人生如逆旅，我亦是行人。
The privilege of a lifetime is to become who you truly are.
两情若是久长时，又岂在朝朝暮暮。
The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
生命太短暂，不要把时间浪费在遗恨上。
Do not go gentle into that good night.
忽如一夜春风来，千树万树梨花开。
The only source of knowledge is experience.
再难的路，只要方向对了，就不怕远。
What we think, we become.
人有悲欢离合，月有阴晴圆缺。
Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
愿所有的相遇，都是久别重逢。
Not how long, but how well you have lived is the main thing.
仰天大笑出门去，我辈岂是蓬蒿人。
If you do what you've always done, you'll get what you've always gotten.
心若没有栖息的地方，到哪里都是流浪。
To handle yourself, use your head; to handle others, use your heart.
衣带渐宽终不悔，为伊消得人憔悴。
Without music, life would be a mistake.
慢慢地走，才能看见更多的风景。
In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.
只恐双溪舴艋舟，载不动许多愁。
Twenty years from now you will be more disappointed by the things that you didn't do than by the ones you did do.
时间会告诉你，简单的喜欢，最长久。
Two roads diverged in a wood, and I took the one less traveled by.
会当凌绝顶，一览众山小。
You have brains in your head. You have feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself any direction you choose.
生活不止眼前的苟且，还有诗和远方。
Normality is a paved road: it's comfortable to walk, but no flowers grow.
春色满园关不住，一枝红杏出墙来。
Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
别在最好的年华里，选择了安逸。
The more that you read, the more things you will know.
举头望明月，低头思故乡。
Once you choose hope, anything's possible.
成大事不在于力量的大小，而在于能坚持多久。
I would rather die of passion than of boredom.
竹杖芒鞋轻胜马，谁怕？一蓑烟雨任平生。
It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
人生就是一场旅行，不必在乎目的地，在乎的是沿途的风景。
Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
寂寞梧桐深院锁清秋。
You may say I'm a dreamer, but I'm not the only one.
做一个有温度的人，不冷漠，不将就。
Change your thoughts and you change your world.
抽刀断水水更流，举杯消愁愁更愁。
Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, today is a gift.
天空没有翅膀的痕迹，但我已飞过。
Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
江山如画，一时多少豪杰。
Keep your face always toward the sunshine — and shadows will fall behind you.
你所站立的那个地方，正是你的中国。你怎么样，中国便怎么样。
In the long run, we shape our lives and we shape ourselves.
春蚕到死丝方尽，蜡炬成灰泪始干。
To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
长大了才明白，快乐是很简单的事，简单是很快乐的事。
I attribute my success to this — I never gave or took any excuse.
劝君更尽一杯酒，西出阳关无故人。
It is never too late to be what you might have been.
活在当下，不念过去，不畏未来。
Money and success don't change people; they merely amplify what is already there.
青山遮不住，毕竟东流去。
What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
世界上只有一种真正的英雄主义，那就是在认清生活真相之后依然热爱生活。
The measure of intelligence is the ability to change.
浮云游子意，落日故人情。
When you arise in the morning, think of what a precious privilege it is to be alive.
有时候，沉默是最好的回答。
Don't count the days; make the days count.
黑云压城城欲摧，甲光向日金鳞开。
If you want to live a happy life, tie it to a goal, not to people or things.
不管前路如何，都要记得回头看看，初心不改。
The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or even touched — they must be felt with the heart.
春风得意马蹄疾，一日看尽长安花。
Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
所有的相遇，都是命中注定的重逢。
If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.
独在异乡为异客，每逢佳节倍思亲。
You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
愿你有一个灿烂的前程，愿你有情人终成眷属，愿你在尘世获得幸福。
Perfection is not attainable, but if we chase perfection we can catch excellence.
夕阳无限好，只是近黄昏。
Be so good they can't ignore you.
凡是过去，皆为序章。
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
采菊东篱下，悠然见南山。
The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
与其用泪水悔恨昨天，不如用汗水拼搏今天。
The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
天生我材必有用，千金散尽还复来。
A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
纵使千山我独行，不问归期。
When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.
